productName: Canna Organix - Sauced & Tossed - Cereal Milk - 1g
description: A hybrid pre-roll of Cereal Milk supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of butter, vanilla, and sweet, delivering a balanced head-and-body experience. Pace yourself.
